text: It is true that no person who is North American is a European. It is also true that no person who is French is a North American. It is a logical necessity that no French person is a European.

premise1.subject: north american
premise1.raw_text: It is true that no person who is North American is a European

premise2.subject: french
premise2.raw_text: It is also true that no person who is French is a North American

conclusion.subject: french
conclusion.raw_text: It is a logical necessity that no French person is a European

validity_details.reason: EEE-1 is not in the 24 valid syllogistic forms
